# Diff proxy server error handling test with aggressive timeouts

# Set ultra-aggressive timeouts for error scenarios
env MCP_TEST_TIMEOUT=1500ms
env MCP_SERVER_TIMEOUT=1s
env MCP_TOOL_TIMEOUT=800ms

# Start the server
exec timeout 6s go run . &
wait 150ms

# Test missing required parameters for text_diff
cat > missing_params.json << EOF
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "id": 1,
  "method": "tools/call",
  "params": {
    "name": "text_diff",
    "arguments": {
      "text1": "Only one text"
    }
  }
}
EOF

bash 'timeout 1500ms echo "$(<missing_params.json)" | mcpcat -'
stdout 'text1 and text2 parameters are required and must be strings'

# Test invalid parameter types for text_diff
cat > invalid_types.json << EOF
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "id": 2,
  "method": "tools/call",
  "params": {
    "name": "text_diff",
    "arguments": {
      "text1": 123,
      "text2": "text"
    }
  }
}
EOF

bash 'timeout 1500ms echo "$(<invalid_types.json)" | mcpcat -'
stdout 'text1 and text2 parameters are required and must be strings'

# Test file_diff with nonexistent file
cat > nonexistent_file.json << EOF
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "id": 3,
  "method": "tools/call",
  "params": {
    "name": "file_diff",
    "arguments": {
      "file1": "nonexistent1.txt",
      "file2": "nonexistent2.txt"
    }
  }
}
EOF

bash 'timeout 1500ms echo "$(<nonexistent_file.json)" | mcpcat -'
stdout 'Error running diff|No such file or directory'

# Test missing required parameters for file_diff
cat > missing_file_params.json << EOF
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "id": 4,
  "method": "tools/call",
  "params": {
    "name": "file_diff",
    "arguments": {
      "file1": "only_one_file.txt"
    }
  }
}
EOF

bash 'timeout 1500ms echo "$(<missing_file_params.json)" | mcpcat -'
stdout 'file1 and file2 parameters are required and must be strings'

# Test mcp_diff with nonexistent mcpdiff command
cat > mcp_diff_fail.json << EOF
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0", 
  "id": 5,
  "method": "tools/call",
  "params": {
    "name": "mcp_diff",
    "arguments": {
      "file1": "test1.mcp",
      "file2": "test2.mcp"
    }
  }
}
EOF

bash 'timeout 1500ms echo "$(<mcp_diff_fail.json)" | mcpcat -'
stdout 'Error running mcpdiff|executable file not found'

# Cleanup
exec rm -f missing_params.json invalid_types.json nonexistent_file.json missing_file_params.json mcp_diff_fail.json
